text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 292 

3975–3999: Rural health clinics (RHC) 
(provider-based) (also CCN ranges 
3400-3499 and 8500–8899) 

4000–4499: Psychiatric hospitals 
(Excluded from IPPS) 

4500–4599: Comprehensive outpatient 
Rehabilitation Facilities (CORF) (also 
CCN ranges 3200–3299 and 4800–
4899) 

4600–4799: Community Mental Health 
Centers (CMHC) (also CCN ranges 
1400–1499 and 4900–4999)
